defs: In an individual manner or relation; as individuals; separately; each by itself; as, every person must apply individually for admission.
quotes: How should that subsist solitarily by itself which hath no substance, but individually the very same whereby others subsist with it?

defs: In an inseparable manner; inseparably; incommunicably; indivisibly; as, individually the same.
quotes: [Omniscience], an attribute individually proper to the Godhead.
